label: Cinderveil Loft
description: Cinderveil Loft is a narrow, high-ceilinged residence set into Seamline Concord’s basalt-glass terrace wall, its facade stippled with electrostatically pinned glass dust that holds a permanent twilight sheen. The interior is organized around a slit window cut to the city’s calibrated auroral sightlines, with mirror-slag inlays laid into the floor to preserve the escarpment’s seam-line geometry underfoot. Built-in shelves and alcoves are carved directly from vitrified stone, their edges softened by accumulated reflective grit. A shallow catch-basin near the entry gathers airborne particulates, maintaining the dwelling’s optical clarity without altering its austere, civic-aligned plan.
